prompt: A single vast dark canvas. Thousands of tiny luminous threads of light like dying embers, arranged in a dense constellation filling the entire frame. Most threads are cold grey and fading, dissolving at their tips into darkness. Only a small cluster — perhaps one in ten — burns warm gold and alive. No text, no axes, no labels, no charts, no globes, no maps. The feeling is of watching stars go out one by one, irreversibly. Cinematic, deeply melancholic, enormous negative space. Organic glowing filaments on pure black. Single frame, 4K.
dataset_name: UNESCO Atlas of the World's Languages in Danger
insight: Of the 7,000 languages spoken today, over 3,000 are endangered and one disappears every two weeks — a silent mass extinction of human thought.
